title: Inmi

text:
Inmi Lee
Inmi Lee is the Associate Arts Professor of Interactive Media Arts (IMA) at NYU Shanghai. Lee’s work explores current sociopolitical systems and the structure of power that exists within the interaction of people. She has exhibited at Anren Biennale, Digital Art Biennale, SIGGRAPH, ISEA, Boston Cyberarts Festival, and the International Performance Art Festival. Prior to joining NYU Shanghai, Lee was an Associate Professor of Digital Media, Art, and Art History at Kuztown University.
Education

Construction of Authenticity in Contemporary Art
